profile.name: Alejandro Sánchez
profile.tagline: Data Science end-to-end: Analysis, Forecast & AI
profile.subtitle: Data Scientist specializing in Machine Learning, Data Engineering, and Complex Process Analysis
profile.availability: Available for remote and hybrid projects (Open to relocation in DACH/Nordics)

about.title: About Me
about.text_short: Data Scientist with a strong background in Biotechnology. After 4 years managing large datasets in research (Germany and Spain), I apply data engineering and Machine Learning to solve strategic business problems.
about.text_long: I define myself as a scientist who discovered their true calling in the data underpinning biology. My journey began in high-level research laboratories (CSIC-UAM, Universität Konstanz), where I learned that data integrity and reproducibility are non-negotiable. Managing terabytes of information in HPC environments taught me to separate signal from noise and optimize complex pipelines. I recently formalized my transition to the tech sector with a Master's in Data Science & AI, applying the same analytical rigor to predictive models, time series, and strategic visualization for decision-making.

points.title: Analytical Rigor
points.description: Proven experience in handling complex datasets (>1TB) applying the scientific method to prevent biases.

points.title: Engineering and Efficiency
points.description: Development of automated pipelines (Python/Bash) and process optimization through parallel computing.

points.title: Business Translator
points.description: Demonstrated ability to explain complex statistical models to technical and non-technical stakeholders.

points.title: Management and Leadership
points.description: International experience leading computational strategy, supervising junior teams, and managing vendors.

items.description: End-to-end development of a demand forecasting system for the retail sector. Implementation of Machine Learning models for sales prediction, customer segmentation, and creation of interactive dashboards for strategic decision-making. The project covered the entire data lifecycle: from ingesting 5 years of bi-weekly transactions to model deployment.
achievements: Processing and cleaning of a dataset with >3000 products and >500K transactions.
Implementation of Lasso Regression for forecasting and K-Means segmentation (6 clusters).
Designed an executive dashboard in Power BI for inventory control.

items.description: Led the laboratory's computational strategy. Designed and implemented automated Python and Bash pipelines for processing massive datasets (>1TB). Mentored the team, managed budgets with external vendors (Novogene, Illumina), and resolved data crises.
achievements: Supervised and mentored 8 junior researchers (Bachelor's Thesis, Master's Thesis, technicians).
Optimized computational processes using GNU Parallel, drastically reducing processing times.
Successfully rescued a failed genomic dataset (ONT) using a hybrid strategy with Illumina sequencing.
Key contribution to 3 peer-reviewed scientific publications.

items.description: Comprehensive management of environmental data lifecycle. Responsible for experimental design, data collection in bioreactors, and multivariate statistical analysis. Intensive computational work using queuing systems (Slurm) on High-Performance Computing (HPC) clusters.
achievements: De novo assembly of eukaryotic transcriptomes from environmental samples.
Multivariate statistical analysis of communities in oligotrophic ecosystems.
Supervised students and managed international procurement of laboratory materials.

items.description: Rigorous data quality evaluation for search and computer vision algorithms. Generation of strict 'Ground Truth' based on complex guidelines to fine-tune Artificial Intelligence models using RLHF (Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback).
achievements: Ensured quality in predictive and recommendation models.
Meticulous analytical documentation for continuous improvement of algorithmic precision.

items.degree: Master in Data Science & Artificial Intelligence
highlights: Specialization in Machine Learning, Deep Learning, and Business Intelligence.
Final Project: 'DSMarket' - End-to-end forecasting system for retail.
Training in model deployment, advanced SQL, and data visualization.
Master's Thesis: Differential transcriptome analysis of dinoflagellates from public raw data.
Development of a complete pipeline: QC, filtering, de novo assembly, and annotation.
Master's Thesis in the Genomic Stability Maintenance Group (CBMSO).
Study of nucleotide insertion by a DNA polymerase, culminating in a publication in 'Biomolecules'.
Bachelor's Thesis: Study of tomato-fungus interaction (symbiosis) against attack by the bacterial pathogen P. aeruginosa.
Use of quantitative culture techniques and gene expression analysis using qPCR.

items.title: DSMarket: Retail Forecasting System
items.description: Full development of a demand prediction system for the retail sector. Integration, cleaning, and transformation of historical data (5 years, 500K+ transactions). Advanced customer segmentation using K-Means and predictive models (Lasso Regression) for sales forecasting. Includes an interactive executive dashboard with business KPIs.

items.title: Genomic Refinement & Data Rescue
items.description: Computational analysis of Ribo-Seq data to redefine genomic annotations in Leishmania. Faced with a degraded dataset due to faulty hardware (Nanopore ONT), I designed a hybrid 'Data Rescue' strategy using high-fidelity Illumina sequences to correct the transcriptome, saving the project. Developed optimized scripts with GNU Parallel.
highlights: Drastically optimized computation times through parallel processing.
Successfully recovered a high-cost failed experiment.

items.title: Environmental Transcriptomics in Aquatic Ecosystems
items.description: Management of massive sequencing data at the University of Konstanz. Data processing on High-Performance Computing (HPC) clusters using queuing systems (Slurm). De novo assembly and multivariate statistical analysis of microbial communities.
highlights: Efficient management of limited computational resources through hybrid workflows (Local/HPC).

items.certification: Daily professional use (2 years in Germany)

items.name: Big Data in the Transportation Sector

items.title: A Proteogenomic Approach to Unravel New Proteins Encoded in the Leishmania donovani (HU3) Genome
items.authors: J. Adán-Jiménez, A. Sánchez-Salvador, E. Morato, J.C. Solana, B. Aguado, J.M. Requena
items.description: Integration of massive mass spectrometry data with genomics. Statistical validation of new coding sequences.

items.title: Refinement of Leishmania donovani Genome Annotations in the Light of Ribosome-Protected mRNAs Fragments (Ribo-Seq Data)
items.authors: A. Sánchez-Salvador, S. González-de-la-Fuente, B. Aguado, P.E. Yates, J.M. Requena
items.description: Development of computational scripts and Ribo-Seq data analysis to detect open reading frames (ORFs).

items.title: Structural determinants responsible for the preferential insertion of ribonucleotides by bacterial NHEJ poldom
items.description: Study resulting from the Master's Thesis in Microbiology research on bacterial DNA repair machinery.

contact_section.availability: Immediately available. Open to on-site or hybrid roles in the DACH region, Nordics, and Spain.
